description: Gorgias provides a customer support and conversational AI platform for ecommerce brands. Its products center on a helpdesk, automation, and AI tools for handling support interactions and related account configuration.
summary: Gorgias exposes a tenant-scoped REST API authenticated by either Basic auth with a user API key or OAuth2 bearer tokens, plus a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.gorgias.com/mcp` that users authorize with their Gorgias account.
